visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A close-up shot features a copper spoon holding a bright orange, raw egg yolk suspended over a bowl of chicken and rice. The background is clean and white. White text "療癒滑嫩又邪惡 深夜親子丼" is overlaid at the top. (2) The yolk is dropped and broken into the bowl, accompanied by animated white sparkles. Thick, stylized text "破蛋儀式" appears in the center frame. (3) A young woman with dark hair tied in a neat high bun and wearing a white halter top is shown eating the bowl. She takes large, satisfying bites, and close-ups show the glistening food. Slogans like "滑順的半熟蛋" and "配上吸收鰹魚鮮湯露" appear over the footage. (4) The woman eats rapidly in a montage, finishing the meal and giving a thumbs up to the camera with an enthusiastic expression. (5) Transition to food preparation: white onions are sliced on a grey board. Three white eggs sit in a glass bowl before being cracked and whisked. (6) The woman holds a bottle of Wan Ja Shan sauce in a modern kitchen setting. She pours the dark liquid into a measuring cup. (7) In a pink frying pan, chicken pieces are seared until golden, followed by onions being sautéed until translucent. (8) The sauce is added, and then beaten eggs are poured over the mixture. A shot shows a pot of steaming white rice. (9) The finished chicken and egg topping is poured from the pan onto the rice. The video ends with the same spoon-and-yolk shot from the beginning.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 療癒滑嫩又邪惡 深夜親子丼. (2) [Variety]: 破蛋儀式. (3) [Slogan]: 滑順的半熟蛋. (4) [Slogan]: 配上吸收鰹魚鮮湯露. (5) [Slogan]: 鮮醇醬汁的雞肉. (6) [Slogan]: 忍不住一口接一口. (7) [Subtitle]: 再來煮一碗吧. (8) [Slogan]: 洋蔥切絲. (9) [Logo]: 萬家香. [Slogan]: 鰹魚. (10) [Subtitle]: 只需要萬家香鰹魚鮮湯露跟10分鐘. (11) [Slogan]: 雞肉煎至金黃. (12) [Slogan]: 洋蔥拌炒至半透明. (13) [Subtitle]: 立刻就可以端出店面級的好吃親子丼. (14) [Subtitle]: 美味到會觸舌. (15) [Slogan]: 療癒滑嫩又邪惡 深夜親子丼.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator demonstrating the cooking and eating process.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with a high bun hairstyle, wearing a white halter-neck sleeveless top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, minimalist kitchen with grey countertops, a pink non-stick frying pan, and blurred cabinetry in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, bright acoustic guitar and piano music begins. A crisp liquid "drop" sound effect triggers as the yolk is shown. (2) A soft, squelching "pop" sound occurs when the yolk breaks. The music maintains a cheerful, steady rhythm. (3) Sounds of chewing and wet smacking accompany the eating montage. A wooden spoon clinks lightly against a ceramic bowl. (4) A bubbly "pop" sound effect transitions to the woman's voice. She says "再來煮一碗吧" with high energy. (5) Sharp, rhythmic "thud" sounds indicate the knife hitting the cutting board as onions are chopped. (6) Two distinct, percussive "crack" sounds occur as eggs hit the bowl rim, followed by the rapid "whisk-whisk" of a fork. (7) A "glug-glug" pouring sound happens. The narrator's voice begins: "只需要萬家香鰹魚鮮湯露跟10分鐘," with a friendly tone. (8) Intense, high-frequency "sizzling" sound fills the mix as chicken hits the hot pan. (9) A second sizzling sound occurs when onions are added. A "clack" sound is heard as the lid is placed. (10) A wet "splash" sound accompanies the eggs being poured into the pan. (11) A heavy, sliding sound effect as the food is served over rice. (12) The music swells briefly and ends with the narrator saying "美味到會觸舌" in a warm, satisfied tone.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Wan Ja Shan Bonito Soup Base by demonstrating how it can be used to create a restaurant-quality 'Midnight Oyakodon' in just 10 minutes, appealing to home cooks looking for convenience and flavor.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product bottle, verbal mention of the brand name, and instructional text on how to use the product as a main ingredient.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'reverse' narrative structure, starting with the finished result to hook viewers before showing the tutorial. High SFX and editing density suggest a social-media-optimized advertising style.
